data.title: Texan sentenced to 23 years for $20M Meta-1 Coin fraud. Promised $44B in gold and $1B in art turned out to be fake.
data.description: Meta-1 Coin was promoted as an investment supported by $44 billion in gold and $1 billion in artworks from 2018 to 2023. However, it was later discovered that these assets were not real.

data.title: CEX volumes plummeted by 39% in Q1, hitting $800 billion in March, lowest since Nov 2023: CoinGecko.
data.description: In March, the centralized crypto exchange trading volume hit a low of $800 billion, marking it as the weakest month since November 2023.

data.title: Hong Kong regulators advocate transition finance; 91% of APAC investors predict growth. 60% of global finance institutions active in this area. Asia-Pacific leads in green investment optimism.
data.description: New research from HKMA reveals that 60% of financial institutions worldwide are currently engaged in transition finance. Among them, the Asia-Pacific region stands out for its strong support for green investments. This region leads in optimistic projections for the growth of environmentally friendly investments.

data.title: 100 North Korean operatives in Web3 exposed by Ethereum-backed project Ketman, warning 53 projects about potential infiltration.
data.description: The Ketman Project has discovered 100 information technology workers from North Korea who have infiltrated various cryptocurrency companies. They have alerted 53 projects about the presence of these North Korean employees. For more details, please refer to the full article.

data.title: Researcher finds counterfeit Ledger device on Chinese platform, linking it to Espressif Systems in firmware analysis.
data.description: The investigation into the counterfeit Ledger device's firmware revealed indicators linking to the Chinese semiconductor company Espressif Systems.

data.title: Analysts predict more gains for Bitcoin, with possible resistance near $78,000 based on active supply cost.
data.description: Market traders believe that Bitcoin still has the potential to increase in value, with projections indicating a possible rally. However, they note that there is a probable limit to this upward trend, indicating that the maximum point may be around $78,000, which is based on the current cost basis of BTC's active supply.

data.title: Ericsson reports first quarter results 2026
data.description: On April 17, 2026, in Stockholm, robust strategic execution was reported with a more balanced global footprint. The company achieved a strong organic sales growth of 6%, primarily driven by Networks, reflecting broadening customer demand across various regions. Additionally, AI native radios were introduced at the Mobile World Congress, expanding the company's product offerings.
